description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade includes a large bay window and a covered porch with a transparent roof, supported by posts and surrounded by a wooden railing. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasting with the dark brown wooden deck that wraps around the building. The side view reveals a long, uninterrupted roofline and a spacious deck area extending from the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with minimal window openings and a continuation of the deck. The overall design is compact, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and natural light through multiple windows.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, bay window, covered porch, and wraparound wooden deck. The exterior is beige with dark brown decking and multiple windows for natural light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bay window, covered porch with transparent roof, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gable roof, solid wall, and the covered porch extending from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain beige wall, minimal windows, and the wooden deck wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Opposite front view displaying the bay window, main entrance, and the full extent of the wraparound deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: bay window on front facade with asymmetrical side windows
